subject: Re: Hi!
body:
Hi! Did you decide what you would like to do? I'm still off from work. I do have to get back on the 7th of June. Please let me know soon :)
   
  Muah!

"J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com> wrote:
          i'm back , just got your message  , tell me what you are doing. 

  ----- Original Message ----
From: Tharangsee <ntharangsee@yahoo.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, April 9, 2008 2:13:12 PM
Subject: Re: Hi!

ok. I'm going to check in with you :)

"J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com> wrote:       I should be back in three weeks

  ----- Original Message ----
From: Tharangsee <ntharangsee@yahoo.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, April 3, 2008 4:46:22 PM
Subject: Re: Hi!

Jefferey. what happened?

"J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com> wrote:       come to new york . ill pay

  ----- Original Message ----
From: Tharangsee <ntharangsee@yahoo.com>
To: jee jee <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, March 21, 2008 10:18:22 PM
Subject: Hi!

  Hello, I just wanted to say Hi!  I really miss you, it's been so long. I hope that you are well Jefferey. I'm still in SF working as an Estheticain.  Things are good. I wish I could see you again someday. I think you would be really proud of me ;) Hope to hear from you.
   
   
  Nanthida
   
  (415) 424-8955

body:

  Nanthida
